top_signals.title: Japanese wages continue to rise, boosting BoJ normalisation policy
top_signals.summary: Uptick in wages alongside inflation is what central bank wants to see to persist with lifting interest rates
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Burnham warned of ‘unsustainable’ public finances by UK fiscal watchdog
top_signals.summary: Office for Budget Responsibility’s annual report says urgent action is needed to cut spending
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NATO to add up to five Northrop Grumman Triton drones for maritime surveillance
top_signals.summary: “It is genuinely made in NATO and is creating jobs on both sides of the Atlantic,” alliance Secretary-General Mark Rutte said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Officials say move is intended to boost lending and support financial markets in a crisis
